search_document:
User Request: Revenue by country.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Revenue by Country
Type: chart
Description: Revenue distribution across different countries
Title: Top Countries by Revenue
Type: table
Description: Countries with the highest revenue
Title: Total Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Overall revenue across all countries

sql_queries.title: Revenue by Country
sql_queries.sql: SELECT o.ShipCountry, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY o.ShipCountry

sql_queries.title: Top Countries by Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT o.ShipCountry, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY o.ShipCountry ORDER BY Revenue DESC LIMIT 5

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID
